info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Schedule Appointments API
info.description: The Schedule Appointments API provides a seamless way for users to book and manage appointments within the system. This API allows clients to create new appointment records, updating relevant parties on scheduled sessions. It is particularly useful for businesses in service industries, such as healthcare, beauty, and professional services, where appointment scheduling is critical. Typical consumers include appointment booking applications and user management systems that enhance operational efficiency.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new appointment by providing the necessary details. Ensure all required fields are filled to successfully create an appointment.

requestBody.description: Creates a new appointment with the provided details. Ensure that all required fields are filled out correctly to avoid validation errors.

400.description: The request parameters are invalid or missing required fields.

200.description: The appointment was successfully created, and the response contains the resource details.

502.description: The server, while acting as a gateway, received an invalid response from the upstream server.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server while processing the request.

404.description: The specified resource could not be found.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the request, indicating failure.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path to the resource that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

details.description: Additional details related to the error.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for the user to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the response for a 400 Bad Request error during the appointment operations.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database timeout occurred while saving account information.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.title: Error Details

customer.description: Indicates if the error is related to customer data.

errorCode.description: A specific error code representing the error.

message.description: A message providing further details about the error.
message.example: The appointment with the specified ID does not exist.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.description: Contains additional information about the error that occurred.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Response

policyId.description: The unique identifier for the policy associated with the appointment.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the policy.

policyType.description: The type of the policy (e.g., health, auto, home).

coverageAmount.description: The total amount of coverage provided by the policy.

premiumAmount.description: The amount of premium to be paid for the policy.

status.description: The current status of the appointment (e.g., active, cancelled).

startDate.description: The start date of the coverage under the policy.

endDate.description: The end date of the coverage under the policy.

message.description: A message providing additional details or context related to the appointment.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Response schema for a successful appointment creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Error Response for Appointment Operations (502)

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the status of the operation is successful or not.

error.description: The error code related to the failure.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The API path that was accessed when the error occurred.

trace.description: A trace identifier for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: Suggested action to take in response to the error.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema represents the error response returned when an appointment operation results in a 502 Bad Gateway error.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

message.description: A human-readable message providing details about the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The path of the request that resulted in the error.

trace.description: A stack trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for the user to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the error response for a failed appointment operation.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

customernumber.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the appointment.

policyType.description: The type of insurance policy associated with the appointment.

coverageAmount.description: The total amount covered by the insurance policy.

premiumAmount.description: The amount the customer needs to pay as a premium for the policy.

startDate.description: The start date of the coverage in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: The end date of the coverage in ISO 8601 format.

beneficiarycode.description: The unique identifier for the beneficiary associated with the appointment.

paymentmode.description: The mode of payment for the insurance premium.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating or updating an appointment in the system.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: 404 Not Found Response for Appointment Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The path of the request that failed.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of the response when a requested appointment operation cannot be found, returning a 404 Not Found error.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.
